description: Structured review verdict for logic_reviewer (passed via codex exec --output-schema). Vocabulary matches agents/findings-synthesizer.md: confidence tiers HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, priority ranks P1/P2/P3. OpenAI strict rules: every property listed in required, additionalProperties false, at every level.

findings.description: All findings. Empty array when the review found nothing to flag.

severity.description: P1 critical (blocks ship), P2 important (fix this cycle), P3 suggestion (log for later).

confidence.description: HIGH verified by code evidence, MEDIUM pattern match, LOW heuristic. LOW confidence can NEVER be P1.

file.description: Repository-relative path of the file the finding is in.

line.description: 1-indexed line the finding anchors to (0 if not line-specific).

detail.description: Issue description, evidence, and a specific fix recommendation.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence overall assessment of the reviewed code.

review_scope.description: What was reviewed (files, diff range, or scope statement from the prompt).
